docs.title: Authentication
docs.description: The AgriTech Platform uses Supabase Auth integrated with a custom multi-tenant authentication provider for comprehensive user authentication and context management.

previous.title: Forms with React Hook Form + Zod

docs.title: Authorization
docs.description: The AgriTech Platform uses a two-layer authorization system: CASL for fine-grained permissions with subscription enforcement, and RoleBasedAccess for simpler database-backed permission checks.

docs.title: Components
docs.description: The AgriTech Platform organizes components by feature and reusability, with a clear separation between UI primitives and business logic components.

docs.title: Forms with React Hook Form + Zod
docs.description: The AgriTech Platform uses React Hook Form v7+ with Zod validation for type-safe, performant forms with minimal re-renders.

docs.title: Internationalization (i18n)
docs.description: The AgriTech Platform supports multiple languages using react-i18next with full RTL (Right-to-Left) support for Arabic.

docs.title: Routing with TanStack Router
docs.description: The AgriTech Platform uses TanStack Router v1 for file-based routing with automatic code splitting and type-safe navigation.

docs.title: State Management
docs.description: The AgriTech Platform uses a dual state management approach: TanStack Query for server state and Jotai for global client state.

docs.title: Styling
docs.description: The AgriTech Platform uses Tailwind CSS as its primary styling solution, with custom components, dark mode support, and responsive design utilities.

docs.title: Frontend Tech Stack
docs.description: The AgriTech Platform frontend is built with modern web technologies, optimized for performance, developer experience, and scalability.

docs.title: Environment Setup
docs.description: This guide covers detailed environment variable configuration for both development and production environments.

docs.title: First Deployment
docs.description: This guide walks you through deploying the AgriTech Platform to production for the first time. We'll cover setting up Supabase, deploying the satellite service, and configuring the frontend.

docs.title: Installation
docs.description: This guide will help you set up your development environment for the AgriTech Platform. Follow these steps to install all necessary prerequisites.

docs.title: Quick Start
docs.description: This guide will help you get the AgriTech Platform up and running on your local machine in just a few minutes.

docs.title: Adding a Complete Feature
docs.description: This comprehensive guide walks you through adding a complete feature to the AgriTech Platform, from database schema to frontend UI, using a real-world example.

docs.title: Adding a New Route
docs.description: This guide walks you through adding a new route to the AgriTech Platform using TanStack Router's file-based routing system.

docs.title: Creating Components
docs.description: This guide covers how to create reusable components in the AgriTech Platform, including proper organization, TypeScript typing, styling with Tailwind CSS, and integration with the UI component library.

docs.title: Database Migration Guide
docs.description: This guide covers the complete workflow for creating and managing database migrations in the AgriTech Platform using Supabase.

docs.title: Deployment Guide
docs.description: This comprehensive guide covers deploying the AgriTech Platform to production, including frontend, backend satellite service, database migrations, and environment configuration.

docs.title: Satellite Integration Guide
docs.description: This guide explains how to integrate with the satellite-indices-service to add vegetation analysis, heatmaps, and satellite imagery features to your AgriTech Platform components.

docs.title: Testing Guide
docs.description: This comprehensive guide covers testing strategies for the AgriTech Platform, including unit tests with Vitest, end-to-end tests with Playwright, and testing patterns for React components, hooks, and API integrations.

docs.title: AgriTech Platform Documentation
docs.description: Welcome to the AgriTech Platform documentation! This comprehensive agricultural technology platform combines multi-tenant architecture, satellite data analysis via Google Earth Engine, and AI-powered insights to revolutionize farm management.

docs.title: Tax Calculations Testing Guide
docs.description: This guide provides comprehensive test scenarios for validating the tax calculation system in the AgriTech Platform accounting module.

docs.title: Troubleshooting Guide
docs.description: This guide covers common issues you may encounter while developing or deploying the AgriTech Platform and their solutions.
